characters.description: Aerith and Bob:While Emma and Johnny have common names, the rest of the groms' are rather unusual-sounding. Although, Lo and Reef's given names are Lauren and Lesly, respectively. While Emma and Johnny have common names, the rest of the groms' are rather unusual-sounding. Although, Lo and Reef's given names are Lauren and Lesly, respectively. Blonde, Brunette, Redhead:Among the girls, Fin (blonde), Lo (brunette) and Emma (redhead).Among the guys, Broseph (blonde), Johnny (brunette), and Reef (redhead). Among the girls, Fin (blonde), Lo (brunette) and Emma (redhead). Among the guys, Broseph (blonde), Johnny (brunette), and Reef (redhead).

characters.name: As a group
characters.description: Aerith and Bob:While Emma and Johnny have common names, the rest of the groms' are rather unusual-sounding. Although, Lo and Reef's given names are Lauren and Lesly, respectively. While Emma and Johnny have common names, the rest of the groms' are rather unusual-sounding. Although, Lo and Reef's given names are Lauren and Lesly, respectively. Blonde, Brunette, Redhead:Among the girls, Fin (blonde), Lo (brunette) and Emma (redhead).Among the guys, Broseph (blonde), Johnny (brunette), and Reef (redhead). Among the girls, Fin (blonde), Lo (brunette) and Emma (redhead). Among the guys, Broseph (blonde), Johnny (brunette), and Reef (redhead).

characters.name: Emma Mackenzie
characters.description: Emma has never surfed before, but she's stoked to learn this summer. She's sweet, honest, optimistic and a bit naive. Although she's super social and best friends with lots of dudes, she totally loses it around guys she's crushing on. Emma is 16-years-old. Betty and Veronica: The Betty to Kelly's Veronica for Ty. Beware the Nice Ones: Emma was able to wrestle Fin to the ground and pin her after a short struggle in "Chum Music". Cute Clumsy Girl: Is prone to getting distracted and losing her balance, both when surfing and at work. Dogged Nice Girl: To Ty.

characters.name: FinMcCloud
characters.description: Fin is a total adrenaline junkie and not afraid of anything. She's a girl but tough, with a quick wit and tons of confidence, basically the ultimate "guy's girl." Fin might be best surfer out of all groms, although Reef would be quick to argue that point. Fin is 16-years-old. Almost Kiss: With Reef. Badass Adorable: An absolutely precious surfer chick. Big Eater: In "Slumber Party Animals", she single-handedly empties out a mini-fridge in the Royal Suite. Boyish Short Hair: It's very messy, just barely goes past her jawline.

characters.name: Lauren "Lo" Ridgemount
characters.description: Lo's the middle child and only daughter of the insanely wealthy Ridgemount family, owners of the Ridgemount Hotel chain and the flagship Surfer's Paradise Ridgemount Resort, and she has always been able to sweet talk her parents into anything by smiling and promising to love her daddy forever. And her mom want so badly to be "the cool mom" that she lets Lo get away with murder. When her dad decides it's time for her to earn her keep, Lo starts working at the resort. But since she's never done chores in her life (other than simply cleaning her room or doing the dishes), she's terrible at her job and never lasts long in any department. Lo is 15-years-old. The Baby of the Bunch: She is the youngest among the main six at 15 years old. Bratty Teenage Daughter: At the start of the series, she acts like a spoiled heiress would; however, her father forces her to take a piece ofHumble Pieby making her work at the resort and live in the employee dorm rather than the Ridgemont penthouse. Clingy Jealous Girl: After she and Reef start dating in Season 2, Lo becomes progressively clingier and more possessive of him—in fact, as noted by Broseph in one episode, it gets to the point of where Lo gets "crazy jealous" if Reef so much aslooksat another girl."He looked at another girl? Where? I'll mash her face like a potato!" Expy: Of Caitlin from6teenand Lindsay fromTotal Drama. And, for some, of Courtney fromTotal Drama, especially in the second season.

characters.name: Broseph
characters.description: A natural born surfer, Broseph is a totally mellow guy with a chilled perspective on the world. Even though he's late for everything, and often causes mix-ups the others have to fix, and is the reigning king of moochers, everybody still loves Broseph. He is 16-years-old. Berserk Button: He has one button and one button only. Being called a "Betty" (Essentially surfer lingo for a rookie), he instantly loses his laid-back nice guy demeanor and undergoes aTraining Montage. Book Dumb: Not as bad as Reef, though. Cloud Cuckoo Lander: At the end of "Brofinger", he actually donates several surfboards to a group ofrhinos. Expy: Of Jude from6teenand Geoff fromTotal Drama.

characters.name: Reef
characters.description: Reef is good-looking and athletic, but he's also a little goofy and tends to overreact in every situation. He's loves to talk trash to Fin and has a competitive streak a mile wide, so it's a good thing he has the surf skills to back it up. Reef is 16-years-old. Almost Kiss: With Fin. Ambiguously Bi: He's shown to be a proud womanizer, but one episode has him commenting on how attractive Ty is. Attractive Bent-Gender: To Bummer in "Mr. Wahine." Book Dumb: His mind is dedicated to surfing, andonlysurfing.When the lack of waves leads him into book reading to occupy his time, however...

characters.name: Johnny St. James
characters.description: Johnny is stylish, witty and cool, and he knows the hotel inside and out, which is invaluable when it comes to a getting the others out of a jam. All he asks in return is that they occasionally give him some surfing lessons, because that's the one area where he really stinks. Johnny is 17-years-old. Better as Friends: What he and Emma ultimately decide. Beware the Nice Ones: He was the only one to stand up to the Marvins, telling them that their kids, Mark and Todd, are brats, and the parents themselves are horrible parents. Butt-Monkey: When it comes to his crush on Emma. Cannot Keep a Secret: He's really bad at keeping secrets, being forced against his will by Lo to keep secrets twice.

characters.name: Bummer
characters.description: TheMean Bossmanager who treats his employees like crap. Bad Boss: Combined withMean BossandControl Freak; hereallydoesn't seem to care about anyone or anything outside of himself, his job and kissing up to the guests and Lo's dad (who's his boss), and he freaks out if even the tiniest thing isn't perfect for the guests at Surfer's Paradise. To name a few examples:He's often calling the staff (particularly the groms) things like "mutants" or "slackers" and making their work lives miserable in countless other ways.He makes them stay in terrible living conditions (and is presumably keeping Lo's dad in the dark about it).He's often giving out strikes and threatening to fire (or even just outright firing) employees for ridiculously petty reasons—he once Fin a strike simply foryawningand, according to Johnny in the series' penultimate episode, Bummer apparently once fired a female employee simply because Bummer thought that she "looked at [Bummer] funny" (it later turned out that the girl just had a lazy eye).By acting as buffer between Lo's dad and the employees who work below him (including Lo herself), he's most likely keeping his boss in the dark about certain aspects of the hotel, such as the conditions of the staff house and embezzling money from the hotel (such as depleting most of the summer staff's food budget to buy himself a personal golf cart). It's very likely that Bummer would lose his job if Lo's dad were to discover his antics. He's often calling the staff (particularly the groms) things like "mutants" or "slackers" and making their work lives miserable in countless other ways. He makes them stay in terrible living conditions (and is presumably keeping Lo's dad in the dark about it). He's often giving out strikes and threatening to fire (or even just outright firing) employees for ridiculously petty reasons—he once Fin a strike simply foryawningand, according to Johnny in the series' penultimate episode, Bummer apparently once fired a female employee simpl

characters.name: Ripper
characters.description: The Bogan: He speaks in an Australian accent and is very crass, being a relentlessGasshole. He also has aJerkassstreak to him, such as being willing to torture the Groms in "Board and Confused", although he can bea nice guy. Gasshole: The only Gasshole on the show known forfartingrather than burping, hence theMeaningful Nickname. Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Lance. Hidden Depths: Surprisingly for for prankster fond ofGassholehumor, he actually takes his lifeguard duties seriously. Known Only by Their Nickname: We never find out his real name (assuming that "Ripper" is just a nickname).

characters.name: No-Pants Lance
characters.description: Heterosexual Life-Partners: With Ripper. Prefers Going Barefoot: Likes to walk around with no shoes. Satellite Character: Doesn't have a major role in episodes unless he's with his best friend Ripper. Those Two Guys: With Ripper.

characters.name: The Big Kahuna
characters.description: A surfer and a staff member who acts as an eccentric mentor figure to the groms. He's mostly the bus driver. Cloudcuckoolander: Can be this at times. Cool Old Guy: An older man who's also a close friend to the teenaged staff at the hotel. Nice Guy: AMellow Fellowwho almost never hesitates to help his friends. No Celebrities Were Harmed: He's basically a kid-friendly version of "The Dude" fromThe Big Lebowski.

characters.name: Wipeout the Mascot
characters.description: Butt-Monkey: He gets very little respect—even Captain Clam, the mascot of Surfer's Paradise archrival hotel, gets more respect than he does. Expressive Hair: More correctly, an expressive plastic fin. The Faceless: We never find out who wears the costume—all that can be gathered is that the person wearing it is a guy, he's most likely a grom and is probably a local (since he was already at the hotel by the time Reef, Emma and Fin arrived there). Vague Age: Due to him beingThe Faceless, it's unknown whether he is a teenager or adult.

characters.name: Kelly
characters.description: The general manager of the Pirate Ship and head of the wait-staff, Kelly's the direct supervisor for Emma and Lo (until the latter gets transferred to the hotel's housekeeping department in "Endless Bummer"). She's apparently around 17 or 18-years-old. Alpha Bitch: Towards the Groms, especially Emma and Lo. Bad Boss: As Emma's (and initially Lo's) direct superior, she can get away with snaking their tips and dumping more work on them if she feels like it. Betty and Veronica: The Veronica to Emma's Betty for Ty's Archie. Burger Fool: As part of her job, she has to wear a pirate wench costume. She ditches it every chance she gets.

characters.name: Rosie
characters.description: The head of housekeeping at the resort. Deadpan Snarker: More often then not she'll usually have a snark ready on hand. Drill Sergeant Nasty: When she's put in charge of somethinganddecides to take it seriously, she gets it done by forcing everyone around her to comply with her demands. Bummer actually likes the results of Rosie being in charge, everyone else not so much. Hidden Depths: She was a surfer herself when she was younger. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: She's grumpy and at times bossy, but she reserves those qualities for those who deserve it (such as Lo being aLazy Bumand the Marvin parents being irresponsible). She's also shown to have friendly interactions with the younger staff members, especially Fin.

characters.name: Snack Shack
characters.description: The manager of the hotel's bakery. Hidden Depths: Despite looking like a stereotypical overweight nerd, Snack Shack is an excellent businessman and an amazing dancer. He's even on Mr. Ridgemount's list of approved boyfriends for Lo. Only Known by Their Nickname: His real name goes unsaid, as everyone just calls him Snack Shack.

characters.name: Mr. Ridgemount
characters.description: The husband of Mrs. Ridgemount and father of Lo and her brothers, Ty and George, Mr. Ridgemount is the founder, owner and head of Ridgemount Resorts. Dating What Daddy Hates: He doesn't approve of Lo's relationship with Reef in the second season, and openly expresses it—near the beginning of the beginning of the series' penultimate episode,he fears what could happen should Reef and Lo actually end up getting married as adults. Drill Sergeant Nasty: Acts like one—proves to be very fitting, because in the first season finale, it turns out that he was in the military at one point. Expy: He is the counterpart to Coach Halder in6teen, even sharing the same English VA. The Faceless: Mostly—his entire face was never seen on the show, but there is some fanart that shows what his entire face might look like (and there are certain episodes where parts of his face are seen).

characters.name: Mrs. Gloria Ridgemount
characters.description: The wife of Mr. Ridgemount and the mother of Ty, Lo and George. Amazingly Embarrassing Parents: Can be this to Lo at times. Mum Looks Like a Sister: She's looks incredibly youthful for a woman (most likely in late-30s/early-40s) who had three kids—here's a picture of Lo and her mom standing together.◊ Nice Girl: She's very patient with others (especially Lo) and is always seen in a good mood. Pretty Fly for a White Guy: Has a tendency of doing this, much to her daughter's embarrassment.

characters.name: Ty Ridgemount
characters.description: The older brother of Lo and George and the oldest child of Mr. and Mrs. Ridgemount—he's 17-years-old. Aloof Big Brother: A nicer version of this trope. Eternally Pearly-White Teeth: So much that with proper lighting, it temporarily blinded Johnny. It's even strong enough to deflect lasers! Foolish Sibling, Responsible Sibling: He's definitely the most mature and responsible of the three Ridgemount-kids. In fact, despite being born into an incredibly wealthy family, Ty's not opposed to working for his spending money (unlike his sister was at the beginning of the series). Horrible Judge of Character: His relationship with Kelly (at least until he realizes what she's really like).

characters.name: George Ridgemount
characters.description: The younger brother of Ty and Lo and the youngest child of Mr. and Mrs. Ridgemount—he's mentioned to be 12-years-old. Annoying Younger Sibling: A strong one to Lo. Bratty Half-Pint: Usually very mean and bratty towards anyone older than him, particularly his sister. Enfant Terrible: An extremely cunning little rat, George has made it his life's mission to torture his big sister, and throughout the show has shown that he will attempt any means to make Lo suffer for no good reason. Hate Sink: There's nothing likeable about that bratty little devil who takes great pleasure in making life miserable for his older sister, Lo.

characters.name: Sonny and Buster
characters.description: A yellow tang and a genetically engineered shark, respectively. They live in the hotel lobby's aquarium and comment on what the human characters are doing. Big Guy, Little Guy: A yellow tang a few inches long and a shark the size of a great white. And just like this trope stereotypes, the little guy (Sonny) is the smarter of the two. Brooklyn Rage: Sonny talks like a New York gangster and has a more abrasive personality between the two of them. Carnivore Confusion: Sonny smells and tastes delicious to Buster, and they've had a few close calls during the series. I'm a Humanitarian: Despite Bummer's claims that Buster is "genetically engineered for non-violent lobbyquarium living", Buster has eaten humans (offscreen), and isn't above trying to take a bite out of his tankmates.

characters.name: TunaMcGillis
characters.description: Walking Shirtless Scene: Unlike the rest of the male cast, who have at most gone an entire episodewithout a shirt,Tunahas never even worn anopen or unbuttoned shirtor even really any other type of top. This may be one of the few perks of working forCaptain Ronover Surfer’s Paradise Ridgemount Resort with employees allowed to weartheir own personal swimsuits as uniforms. Walking Swimsuit Scene: In addition to never seen wearing a shirt throughout the series,Tunais only shown wearing the same yellow swim trunks with either a black stripe or black belt, except in the episode “Brofinger” where thanks toReefand Fin putting a big fish, possibly a tuna, in his trunks which in turn lead him tolose his trunksleaving onlyPixellationto cover hisGag Penis.

characters.name: Betty Sandstone
characters.description: A female surfer who works with Tuna. Pink Means Feminine: She wears a pink swimsuit and pink makeup to match. Punny Name: Her name is a pun off of "Betty" (girl) and "Sandstone" (a type of rock commonly seen in beaches).

characters.name: Captain Clam
characters.description: The hotel's version of Wipeout.

characters.name: Amber Green
characters.description: A surfing rival of Fin's. Amber became Reef's girlfriend in the episodeWho Knows What Evil Lurks In The Heart Of Clam?, but soon broke up with her after he found out how clingy and obsessive she was. Cute and Psycho: She's a pretty redhead who'sverymentally unstable. Expy: Of Lydia from6teen. They even share the same voice actors! The Rival: She competed with Fin for the Junior Surfing Competition. The two do not like each other. Yandere: She constantly sneaks into Reef's room when he's sleeping and made a shirt that has them married. No wonder why Reef is so afraid of her.

characters.name: MarthaMcCartney
characters.description: An apathetic and aloof goth girl who worked at the resort. She was Emma's roommate, but the two didn't get along. She got fired after Johnny switched her evaluation score with Emma. Alliterative Name:MarthaMcCartney. Deadpan Snarker: Most of her dialogue consists of snarky comments. Goth: The makeup and the attitude suggests she could be one. Grumpy Bear: Acts very grumpy and sullen for a hotel worker.

characters.name: Stanley Stevens
characters.description: The executive editor ofLuxury Vacations Magazineand a former beach bum. Alliterative Name:StanleyStevens. Grumpy Old Man: Due to stress from his job, he's pretty grouchy. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: He can be quite laid-back at times, likely reflecting his younger years.

characters.name: Kai
characters.description: The son of the head of the Vintage Surfboard Tour who has a crush on Lo in which she felt the same way. However, their relationship came to an end for no precise reason.

characters.name: Chrissy
characters.description: A guest at the hotel whom Bummer fell in love with. He wouldn't ask her out due to it being a violation of his rule of not dating any guests.
